name: Deploy to Cloud Run

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  SERVICE_NAME: hms-v3
  REGION: asia-south1

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Build & Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Auth to GCP
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v1
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GCP_SA_KEY }}

      - name: Set up Cloud SDK
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v1

      - name: Enable APIs
        run: |
          gcloud services enable run.googleapis.com cloudbuild.googleapis.com

      - name: Deploy to Cloud Run
        run: |
          gcloud run deploy ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }} \
            --source . \
            --region ${{ env.REGION }} \
            --allow-unauthenticated \
            --port 8080 \
            --memory 512Mi \
            --set-env-vars "SECRET_KEY=${{ secrets.SECRET_KEY }},APP_ENV=production"

      - name: Get Service URL
        run: |
          gcloud run services describe ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }} \
            --region ${{ env.REGION }} \
            --format "value(status.url)"
```

---

**Step 4** — Your folder structure should now look like:
```
D:\dev-ops\app\hms_v3\
├── .github\
│   └── workflows\
│       └── deploy.yml   ← new file
├── app.py
├── Dockerfile
├── requirements.txt
├── .dockerignore
└── ...
